description: Maps rotation day + pitcher role to a default throwing day type. Used by plan_generator to select the appropriate throwing session template.

day_0.label: Game Day
day_0.notes: No structured throwing — game outing is the session

day_1.label: Recovery
day_1.notes: Lightest throwing day. Reverse throws + pivot picks only, then light catch.

day_2.label: Hybrid B — Extension
day_2.notes: Full plyo routine at 60-70%, long toss extension only. High training day.

day_3.label: Hybrid A — Compression
day_3.notes: Full plyo at 80-90%, extension + compression throws. Or bullpen day.

day_4.label: Recovery
day_4.notes: Light plyo + catch play. Lower body strength focus in weight room.

day_5.label: Recovery + Short Box
day_5.notes: Light plyo + short box bullpen (45-50ft). Pre-start feel work.

day_6.label: Rest / Mobility
day_6.notes: No throwing. Light catch only if pitcher requests.

day_1.label: Recovery
day_1.notes: Recovery plyo + light catch only. Arm flush focus.

day_2.label: Ready Day — Hybrid B
day_2.notes: Full plyo at 60-70%, flat ground or long toss extension. Must be ready to pitch.
